name: Fantasy Gloryhole
description:
There's a hole in your wall... It wasn't there yesterday.

˗ˏˋ ✮ ˎˊ˗

“Well? Are you shy or something?”

✦. OCs | Fantasy Goonbot .✦

Scenario notes:

  • User has no set gender or background

  • Unestablished Relationship

  • This bot has been coded to have male and female characters, with the chance for any to appear on the other side of the wall at random. I've kept their coding lighter in the actual bot, but their names and species are tied to a heap of extra info in the script! (Another stress test)

  • Potential characters:

    Minotaur (Garrik) & Holstaur (Luma)

    Infernals (Male: Malrik, Female: Zurael)

    Huminoid Slimes (Male: Thrix, Female: Syrli)

    Elves (Male: Kael, Female: Elira)

    Dragonkin (Male: Rhaevos, Female: Syrrin)

    Incubus (Lucien) & Succubus (Nyssa)

  • (Give the bot a bit of a push in the right direction if there’s a particular species or character you want to play with!)

  • Setting: Your home, where a hole just appeared in a wall...

Author note: We listen and we don't judge ✨ (I wanted a gloryhole bot, okay? And I do love my fantasy creatures.)

TW: Potential Violence/Possessiveness, Anomalous Sex, Non-Human Characters, Non-Human/oversized Cocks

DISCLAIMER: J.ai LLM suffers from bugs, speaking for User, repetitiveness, and many issues with anatomy, memory and darker/NSFW subjects. This is out of my control and I can not fix it. Please see the J.ai Discord for more info.
